name: Avocado-Shrimp Aspic
recipeIngredient: 1 and 1/2 cups Shrimp, cooked and shelled
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in cold water for a few minutes.
2. Add boiling water to the gelatin and stir until it dissolves completely.
3. Gradually mix in the sieved avocado, lemon juice, salt, Worcestershire sauce (if using), Tabasco (if using), and minced pimiento.
4. Chill the mixture until it begins to thicken slightly.
5. Add the cooked and shelled shrimp, stirring gently.
6. Pour the mixture into a cold, wet mold.
7. Refrigerate until firm, then unmold on a bed of lettuce.
From "Watkins Salad Book" by Elaine Allen, The J.R. Watkins Company, 1946.
